hero.subtitle: I build performant and elegant web & mobile products, from design to backend architecture.

about.bio: Full-Stack developer turning complex problems into intuitive interfaces. I aim to build exceptional products.

skills.title: Frontend Development

skills.description: Robust APIs in Node.js and Java. Expertise in microservices and security.

skills.description: Optimized data architecture with PostgreSQL. Mastery of indexing.

skills.description: Typed development with TypeScript, combined with React and React Native.

skills.title: Creative Solutions
skills.description: Solving complex problems with a user-centered approach.
